patch.value: GH-532: --estimated-minutes accepts negative numbers and floats — missing non-negative-integer range validation

pm update --estimated-minutes -5 and 1.5 both succeed (exit 0) and persist, while non-numeric input is correctly rejected — the coercion validates type but not range/integrality. Negative effort corrupts aggregate sums and flow metrics. Fix: reject negatives (and either reject or round-document fractionals) with the same 'Invalid argument value' error shape used for non-numeric input, at the shared numeric-coercion site so create/update/update-many all inherit it. Same silent-wrong-data family as pm-96vo/pm-kj4k.
Negative and non-integer --estimated-minutes rejected on create/update/update-many with domain-stating error; existing stored invalid values unaffected; regression tests; GH-532 closed
